description: Comprehensive Kong API Gateway monitoring dashboard using the OpenTelemetry plugin (Kong 3.13+). Covers request rate, latency percentiles (p50/p90/p99), error metrics, bandwidth, upstream health, connection states, request/response sizes, Lua shared dict memory, worker Lua VM memory, Nginx timers, and DB/CP connectivity status. Variables: deployment environment, Kong service, Kong route.
title: Kong Gateway

widgets.description: Total HTTP requests handled by Kong in the selected time range

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route

widgets.title: Total Requests

widgets.description: Average request rate across Kong in requests per second

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route

widgets.title: Request Rate (req/s)

widgets.description: Current number of active Nginx connections

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.connection.state = 'active'

widgets.title: Active Connections

widgets.description: 1 = connected to DB, 0 = not connected. Always 1 in DB-less mode.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment

widgets.title: DB Connected

widgets.description: 1 = data plane connected to control plane, 0 = not connected

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment

widgets.title: CP Connected

widgets.description: Total 4xx + 5xx errors in the selected time range

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route AND kong.response.status_code >= 400

widgets.title: Total Errors (4xx+5xx)

widgets.description: Current number of idle/waiting Nginx connections

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.connection.state = 'waiting'

widgets.title: Waiting Connections

widgets.description: Total number of handled connections (cumulative)

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.connection.state = 'handled'

widgets.title: Handled Connections

widgets.description: HTTP request rate (req/s) broken down by Kong service

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route

widgets.title: Request Rate by Service

widgets.description: Request rate grouped by HTTP response status code — shows 2xx, 4xx, 5xx distribution

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route

widgets.title: Requests by HTTP Status Code

widgets.description: Request body size percentiles (p50/p90/p99) in bytes

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route
deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route
deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route

widgets.title: Request Size (p50 / p90 / p99)

widgets.description: Response body size percentiles (p50/p90/p99) in bytes

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route
deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route
deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route

widgets.title: Response Size (p50 / p90 / p99)

widgets.description: Total end-to-end request latency percentiles (Kong + upstream) in seconds

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route
deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route
deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route

widgets.title: Request Latency (p50 / p90 / p99)

widgets.description: Latency added by upstream services only (excludes Kong plugin overhead) in seconds

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route
deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route
deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route

widgets.title: Upstream Latency (p50 / p90 / p99)

widgets.description: Kong internal processing time only (gateway overhead, excludes upstream) in seconds

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route
deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route
deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route

widgets.title: Kong Internal Latency (p50 / p90 / p99)

widgets.description: Rate of 5xx server errors per Kong service

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route AND kong.response.status_code >= 500 AND kong.response.status_code < 600

widgets.title: 5xx Error Rate by Service

widgets.description: Rate of 4xx client errors broken down by specific status code

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route AND kong.response.status_code >= 400 AND kong.response.status_code < 500

widgets.title: 4xx Errors by Status Code

widgets.description: Combined 4xx + 5xx error rate over time

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route AND kong.response.status_code >= 400

widgets.title: Error Rate (4xx + 5xx)

widgets.description: 5xx errors broken down by route to identify problematic endpoints

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route AND kong.response.status_code >= 500 AND kong.response.status_code < 600

widgets.title: 5xx Errors by Route

widgets.description: Ingress (request) and egress (response) bandwidth rate per Kong service in bytes/s

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route
deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.service.name IN $kong_service AND kong.route.name IN $kong_route

widgets.title: Bandwidth by Service (bytes/s)

widgets.description: Current active, writing, waiting, and reading connection counts from Nginx

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.connection.state IN ('active', 'writing', 'waiting', 'reading')

widgets.title: Nginx Connection States

widgets.description: Cumulative accepted vs handled connections — a gap indicates rejected connections

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.connection.state = 'accepted'
deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment AND kong.connection.state = 'handled'

widgets.title: Accepted vs Handled Connections

widgets.description: Health state per upstream target. Value=1 when state is active. States: healthy, unhealthy, dns_error

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment

widgets.title: Upstream Target Health

widgets.description: Used vs total capacity of Kong's Lua shared dictionaries

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment
deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment

widgets.title: Lua Shared Dict Memory

widgets.description: Memory used by each Kong worker's Lua VM, grouped by worker PID

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment

widgets.title: Worker Lua VM Memory

widgets.description: Number of pending and running Nginx timers — high counts may indicate resource pressure

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment_environment

widgets.title: Nginx Timers (Pending / Running)
